serverInfo.name: invinoveritas
serverInfo.description: Lightning-paid AI reasoning and decision intelligence using L402 (Bitcoin Lightning). Pay-per-insight, no accounts, no subscriptions.

authentication.notes: Pay-per-use via Lightning (L402). Send a POST request to receive a 402 response with a bolt11 invoice. Pay the invoice, then retry with header: Authorization: L402 <payment_hash>:<preimage>
